scripts.dev: bun run database && next dev --turbopack && bun run database:down
scripts.launch: bun run database && bun run build && bun run start
scripts.launch:test: bun run database:test && bun run build && bun run start && bun run database:down
scripts.lint-format: bun run lint && bun run format
scripts.pre-commit: bun run test && bun run lint-format
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: bun run database:test && bun run build && start-server-and-test start http://localhost:3000 'bunx playwright test' && bun run database:down
scripts.database:dev: bun run database && prisma migrate dev && bun run database:down
scripts.database:test: docker compose -f compose-test.yml up -d && bun run database:create
scripts.database:studio: bun run database && bunx prisma studio && bun run database:down
